verses.1: Sing to the LORD a new song!
verses.3: Declare his glory among the nations,
verses.4: For the LORD is great, and greatly to be praised!
verses.5: For all the gods of the peoples are idols,
verses.6: Honor and majesty are before him.
verses.7: Ascribe to the LORD, you families of nations,
verses.8: Ascribe to the LORD the glory due to his name.
verses.9: Worship the LORD in holy array.
verses.10: Say among the nations, “The LORD reigns.”
verses.11: Let the heavens be glad, and let the earth rejoice.
verses.12: Let the field and all that is in it exult!
verses.13: before the LORD; for he comes,
